title: Loop Control Config v1
description: Standalone loop control configuration consumable by the runtime engine. Extracted from state machine spec for independent policy management.

exceeded_action.description: When any loop limit is exceeded, workflow routes to this state.

counter_reset_rules.rule: Phase iteration counters reset when workflow transitions to a different phase.
counter_reset_rules.example: researching counter resets when workflow moves to planning.

counter_reset_rules.rule: Tool call counters are per-phase-entry. They reset on re-entry to the phase.
counter_reset_rules.example: building tool calls reset when workflow re-enters building from build_review fail.

counter_reset_rules.rule: Error retry counters are cumulative per workflow instance. They do NOT reset on phase change.
counter_reset_rules.example: workflow_error retry count persists across researching -> planning -> building.
